explanation: Inserted quotes around the share path to test if the rule detects quoted arguments correctly.
Used the original command without any mutation as a baseline for comparison.
Substituted '/delete' with '/D', which is an equivalent short option accepted by net.exe.
Used a built-in administrative share as a common test case for the rule.
Used a named pipe share to test if the rule captures different types of share deletions.
Combined omission and substitution by using '/D' and omitting unnecessary spacing.
